name: INDOPACOM — first island chain
subtitle: PRC posture, contested
description: PRC SIGINT/DF posture along the first island chain (Taiwan Strait / Ryukyus / Philippines). Sources: CSIS China Military Watch (2022–2024), Janes Land Warfare Platforms, PLA SSF open-source order-of-battle. Drops DWL-002 passive surveillance (long airborne reach), CHL-906 tactical DF, and a generic airborne SIGINT pod orbit.

threats.note: DWL-002 passive surveillance — multi-static, claimed 400 km vs. airborne emitters
CHL-906 tactical DF vehicle — Borisoglebsk-class analog
Airborne SIGINT (Y-9JB-class) — high orbit, fast TTF
